home home about us about us projects projects

projects projects

a curated archive of works. a curated archive of works.

01 光の標本 Light Specimen 02 KINU Film Title KINU Film Title 03 余白の編集 Editing the Margin 04 構造の庭 Structural Garden 05 白い反復 White Repetition 06 記録のかたち Form of Record

光の標本 Light Specimen

year year
2026
client client
Sample Client
medium medium
video / design video / design
category category
film / installation film / installation

光の移ろいを観察するための短編映像と展示構成。無機質な素材の表面に残る微細な変化を、一定の距離から記録したプロジェクトです。

A short film and installation study observing shifts in light. The project records subtle changes left on industrial surfaces from a steady, measured distance.

open projectopen project

KINU Film Title KINU Film Title

year year
2025
client client
Independent
medium medium
moving image moving image
category category
moving image moving image

人物や場所の説明から少し離れ、気配そのものを映像として組み立てた作品。反復する動きと余白を使い、記憶の輪郭を静かに扱っています。

A moving image work that steps away from direct explanation of people or places, composing presence itself through repeated motion and restrained space.

余白の編集 Editing the Margin

year year
2024
client client
Studio Sample
medium medium
motion / visual motion / visual
category category
art direction art direction

紙面、映像、展示導線を横断して、情報量を抑えながら印象の残り方を設計したアートディレクション。整理された余白を主要な素材として扱いました。

An art direction project across print, film, and exhibition flow, shaping how impressions remain while reducing visual noise. Ordered space becomes a primary material.

構造の庭 Structural Garden

year year
2024
client client
Sample
medium medium
installation installation
category category
space / object space / object

素材の重なりと視線の移動から、静かな構造を立ち上げる空間プロジェクト。余白の中にある境界を観察します。

A spatial project building a quiet structure through material layers and movement of sight, observing boundaries inside open space.

白い反復 White Repetition

year year
2023
client client
Sample
medium medium
visual study visual study
category category
texture / image texture / image

同じ素材が少しずつ異なる表情を見せる瞬間を集めた視覚研究。反復と差異のあいだにある感触を扱います。

A visual study collecting moments where the same material reveals slightly different expressions, working between repetition and difference.

記録のかたち Form of Record

year year
2023
client client
KINU
medium medium
publication publication
category category
book / sound book / sound

映像と音の記録を、紙とオブジェクトの形式へ置き換えるための試作。保管される時間の手触りを設計します。

A prototype translating records of film and sound into paper and object form, designing the tactile feeling of stored time.
